action.reasoning: Observation: SFNO worse (val_loss=0.028) than hybrid (0.021). Best rmse_z500=465.47. All models plateau at ~0.021 val_loss with severe overfitting. Analysis: Need to try SWA (Stochastic Weight Averaging) which averages weights across training trajectory to reduce overfitting. Also try: (1) latitude-weighted loss matching eval metric, (2) larger hybrid model, (3) OneCycleLR. The hybrid model architecture is best so far. Decision: Train hybrid model with SWA + lat-weighted loss + larger capacity.
action.command: MODEL_TYPE=hybrid BASE_CH=96 EMBED_DIM=384 DEPTH=8 DROPOUT=0.1 NUM_EPOCHS=100 LR=3e-4 WEIGHT_DECAY=1e-4 RESIDUAL=1 PATIENCE=20 USE_SWA=1 SWA_START=30 BATCH_SIZE=64 python train.py
